name: Edgar Degas

acts.description: Virulent anti-Semite who broke with lifelong friends over the Dreyfus Affair, supporting Dreyfus's unjust imprisonment

behavior_summary: Impressionist master and enthusiastic anti-Dreyfusard who ended friendships with Jewish artists and publicly aligned himself with anti-Semitic forces in France.

art.summary: One of the founders of Impressionism. His ballet and racecourse paintings are among the most beloved works in Western art. Technical genius in capturing movement.

verdict.blurb: He painted the most beautiful pictures of dancers in art history and ended his friendship with Camille Pissarro because Pissarro was Jewish and defended Dreyfus. The anti-Semitism was not incidental — it cost him real friendships and he chose it anyway. The dancers keep dancing.
